diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al
index bc269dae..ed59b0a8 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/Tests/SCM-Service/ServicePages.Codeunit.al
@@ -1161,6 +1161,37 @@ codeunit 136150 "Service Pages"
         Assert.AreEqual(ShipToAddress."Phone No.", ServiceInvoice."Ship-to Phone".Value, ServiceInvoice."Ship-to Phone".Caption());
     end;
 
+    [Test]
+    [HandlerFunctions('ServiceOrderReportHandler')]
+    [Scope('OnPrem')]
+    procedure PrintServiceOrderWithWorkDescriptionFromCardPage()
+    var
+        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
+        ServiceOrder: TestPage "Service Order";
+    begin
+        // [FEATURE] [Print] [Order] [Work Description]
+        // [SCENARIO] Printing a service order with work description from the service order card page should not throw an error.
+        // Bug: When printing a service order with work description from the card page, an error
+        // "An error occurred and the transaction is stopped" was thrown because Report.RunModal
+        // with GUI=true is not allowed in write transactions (CurrPage.Update(true) starts a write transaction).
+        Initialize();
+
+        // [GIVEN] A service order with work description
+        LibraryService.CreateServiceDocumentWithItemServiceLine(ServiceHeader, ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Order);
+        ServiceHeader.SetWorkDescription(LibraryRandom.RandText(10));
+        Commit();
+
+        // [WHEN] Print the service order from the service order card page
+        ServiceOrder.OpenEdit();
+        ServiceOrder.GotoRecord(ServiceHeader);
+        ServiceOrder."&Print".Invoke();
+
+        // [THEN] No error occurs and the report is generated successfully
+        // If the fix is not applied, the test will fail with error:
+        // "Report.RunModal is allowed in write transactions only if 'RequestForm = false'"
+        ServiceOrder.Close();
+    end;
+
     [StrMenuHandler]
     [Scope('OnPrem')]
     procedure StrMenuHandler(Options: Text[1024]; var Choice: Integer; Instruction: Text[1024])
@@ -1186,6 +1217,12 @@ codeunit 136150 "Service Pages"
     begin
     end;

+    [Scope('OnPrem')]

+    end;
